title: Artificial Flowers Indoor Cream Real Touch Artificial Carnation Flowers Silk Faux Flowers Fake Carnation with Long Stems for Wedding Home Table Centerpieces 3814
features: Package included - 3 pcs fake flowers for outside (the vase is not included).
Material - tall artificial flowers head made of silk cloth. Metal wire as skeleton, wrapped by plastic, can be cut or bent.

Perfect Decoration - E.g:(engagement/ wedding ceremony/ Valentine’s Day/ Anniversary/ Lover's Birthday/ Festivals etc.) or home decor:( vases/ stairs/ doors/ frames/ mirrors/ ugly pipes/ garden/ table/ swing/ arches/ cars/ bikes.) etc.

Never Wither - faux flowers that look real are maintenance-free, perfect for pollen allergic people. Fake flowers is uv resistant and never fade. This flowers can against fierce wind rainstorm and insolation.
Easy to maintain - The large artificial plants outdoor may be squeezed and deformed during transportation. Please adjust the branches and flowers to the most natural state.
